subcodes.first_line: O dervish! Hearken unto the call of this Dervish, that perchance the breezes of love wafting from this direction may stir thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا درویش اسمع ندآء هذا الدرویش لعل تهتزک نفحات الحب التی یهب عن شطر
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @suffering and imprisonment
